creator: maxim@macomnet.ru
text:
On Tue, 3 Nov 2009, 08:53-0800, Jeremy Huddleston wrote:

> revision 1.5 is 12 years old.  I suggest you update whatever you
> used to find it as the current source.
>
We are speaking about different mktemp.c.  Mine from usr.bin/mktemp/.

> This is against version 1.31 of mktemp.c :
>
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/src/lib/libc/stdio/mktemp.c?only_with_tag=MAIN
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/~checkout~/src/lib/libc/stdio/mktemp.c?rev=1.31
>
Yep, I see now.

-- 
Maxim Konovalov
